'''fayosho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xiphoomphalopagus|xiphoomphalopagus]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-y-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xiphoomphalopagus|xiphoomphalopagus]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| fayosho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæyesheth|fæyesheth]] || [[word:fæyeshej|fæyeshej]] || [[word:fæyeshesh|fæyeshesh]] || [[word:fæyeshe|fæyeshe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fayoyoshoth|fayoyoshoth]] || [[word:fayoyoshoj|fayoyoshoj]] || [[word:fayoyoshosh|fayoyoshosh]] || [[word:fayoyosho|fayoyosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fayoshoth|fayoshoth]] || [[word:fayoshoj|fayoshoj]] || [[word:fayoshosh|fayoshosh]] || [[word:fayosho|fayosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fayofshoth|fayofshoth]] || [[word:fayofshoj|fayofshoj]] || [[word:fayofshosh|fayofshosh]] || [[word:fayofshof|fayofshof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fayoshotho|fayoshotho]] || [[word:fayoshojo|fayoshojo]] || [[word:fayoshosho|fayoshosho]] || [[word:fayoshoko|fayoshoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fayoshoth|fayoshoth]] || [[word:fayoshoj|fayoshoj]] || [[word:fayoshosh|fayoshosh]] || [[word:fayosho|fayosho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fayoshothol|fayoshothol]] || [[word:fayoshojol|fayoshojol]] || [[word:fayoshoshol|fayoshoshol]] || [[word:fayoshokol|fayoshokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fayoshothotho|fayoshothotho]] || [[word:fayoshojojo|fayoshojojo]] || [[word:fayoshoshosho|fayoshoshosho]] || [[word:fayoshoko|fayoshoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fayoshothon|fayoshothon]] || [[word:fayoshojon|fayoshojon]] || [[word:fayoshoshon|fayoshoshon]] || [[word:fayoshokon|fayoshokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fayoshothoro|fayoshothoro]] || [[word:fayoshojoro|fayoshojoro]] || [[word:fayoshoshoro|fayoshoshoro]] || [[word:fayoshokoro|fayoshokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
